'''Gavin Zmitt''' was a member of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] who worked in the office of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. A few months following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Zmitt filed a report regarding the [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]].<ref name="Underworld" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] named Gavin Zmitt after his friend, [[Kevin Schmitt]], who had been the lead level designer on ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''.<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|RyanKaufman|42|Insider 89 "Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum & Villainy" Endnotes}}</ref>
